rationale: R3 decision-inertness holds on the merged branch. grep of internal/panel non-test files shows .Gate only in create.go (writer-side stamp + doc comments); gate.go's PanelGateDecision and Panel.ApproveThreshold never read .Gate (awk of ApproveThreshold body: zero Gate refs). The new TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues pins Action+Message+ApproveThreshold identical across all 5 real enum values plus "", over both Allow and Block scenarios — closing 112's {"",bead,weird}-only gap. --gate is validated against the SINGLE config.PanelGateKeys (declared once at config.go:101); isValidPanelGateKey iterates that slice, no second copy; the test's hardcoded literals are documented config-free-leaf mirrors, drift-caught by cmd/mindspec enum tests. Byte-identical-when-omitted proven by TestCreate_StampsGate's marshal-equality subtest + omitempty. internal/panel imports no internal/config (only comment mentions). R4: change is a superseding comment + TestLoad_EmptyStringModel only — resolve-to-family, neither-set case still refused with the distinctive phrase + recovery line; no behavioral change; existing 112 config tests green. Targeted suite (Gate|EmptyStringModel|DecisionInert) all PASS; go build ./... clean.
findings: R3: PanelGateDecision/ApproveThreshold confirmed decision-inert — no .Gate read in gate.go/panel.go decision paths; only advisory/writer usage.
R3: --gate validated against single config.PanelGateKeys (config.go:101); no duplicate enum; reject-before-write via isValidPanelGateKey.
R3: byte-identical panel.json when --gate omitted (omitempty + explicit byte-equality test); internal/panel stays config-free leaf (no internal/config import).
R3: TestPanel_GateFieldDecisionInertAllEnumValues correctly extends coverage to all 5 CLI-writable enum values across Allow+Block.
R4: resolve-to-family is comment-only + TestLoad_EmptyStringModel; neither-set refusal preserved; no behavioral change; 112 config tests green.
